description: CompositionBlack sweatshirt with body made of cotton/polyester fleece with rib made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a hood with woven cotton drawcord laces, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a hand-warmer pouch on front, bold puma logo in gold sequins on front, branding on left lower arm and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careHand washDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanLay flat to dryCool iron, do not iron on printThis stylish hooded sweater from puma will keep you warm in the winter chill.  Cosy polyester fleece feels soft next to your skin and provides a thermal layer.  Wear it with puma jeans and sneakers to demonstrate that Sports Brands have the best style when it comes to casual dressing, or use it as an extra layer when you're off out for your early morning run.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
